Senior Software Engineer
Acme Corp Warsaw, Masovian Voivodeship, Poland (Remote)
$120,000/yr - $150,000/yr

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our remote-first team.

You will work on challenging distributed systems built with TypeScript and Node.js.

  • 5+ years of experience in software engineering
  • Proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms
  • Experience with distributed systems and microservices

This is a fully remote position. We offer competitive compensation and flexible hours.
